templates.body:
SITE OBSERVATION LOG
Account/site: _______________  Date: _______

Watch blocks: boot / work / update / EOD shutdown / replace path
What they do: _______________
What they say the failure is: _______________
Artifacts (screens, tickets): _______________
Allies on site: _______________

PROCESS MATCH WORKSHEET

Bench outcome on returns: _______________
Field replace trigger: _______________
Process that can create same symptom without bad silicon: _______________
Evidence link: _______________
Class: [ ] HW  [ ] process  [ ] OS/update  [ ] env  [ ] mixed

EXEC ROOT CAUSE BRIEF
Account: _______________  Date: _______

Claimed problem: _______________
What we measured (bench): _______________
What we saw (site): _______________
Root cause class: _______________
Ask of leadership: _______________
What we will change on our side: _______________

TRUST DAY PLAN
Site: _______________

Morning: observe with local team (no slides)
Mid: shared lunch / informal debrief
After: confirm facts before exec room
Do not: surprise local staff in front of their boss without a path

HW VS PROCESS/OS CHECK
[ ] Unit passes hardware protocol
[ ] Failure appears after update/reboot storm
[ ] Failure appears after hard power loss
[ ] Imaging/reimage clears without new silicon
[ ] Same SKU fails only at this site/process
Notes: _______________
